title: 7A The Word on the Street — Объяснение значений

items.example: The origin of the word 'sandwich' comes from the Earl of Sandwich.
Look up the definition of the word in a dictionary.
The meaning of this idiom is not obvious from the individual words.
The English word 'guitar' derives from the Spanish word 'guitarra'.
The phrase originated in the 19th century as a naval expression.
The term 'artificial intelligence' was first used in the 1950s.
The phrase 'break the ice' means to start a conversation in a social setting.
LOL is an abbreviation for 'laugh out loud'.
